column3: I don't necessarily need these but they're just the things I get from the printer
I will add what I actually used to the BOM after the printer is built
Aluminum rod mounts and corner brackets
Aluminum or plastic blocks holding bearings
Bearings spin freely; great for custom belt routing
X, Y, Z, extruder; high quality, ~40–50 N·cm
Smaller geared motor; can reuse for direct drive
Mechanical switches; easy to wire to custom boards
Part cooling or electronics cooling; brushless DC
Hotend components; only reuse if compatible with new hotend
Good quality, can cut and reuse connectors
Stepper mounts, gantry corners, idler mounts
M3, M4 sizes; keep a variety
Any internal aluminum parts for reinforcing your DIY frame
Could be adapted for a bed in DIY printers
